# Ducky and the Bubbles of Clarity

<img width="100px" align="right" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d70d1aa7-6dd1-4e21-abcc-6eb5834526c7" />

In a calm forest glade, upon a grand pool of reflection (strangely shaped like bathtub), you meet **Ducky**, the wisest of friends bobbing in introspective thought.

Overhearing another conversation “🛁 Talk through your problems... Out loud...”, Ducky now draws your attention:
